training.method: real-crop copy-paste composites (1200) + real train, YOLO11m architecture

acceptance_report.source: held-out test (count-banana-plants, aerial UAV, per-plant labels)
acceptance_report.eval_method: raw detector, imgsz=1024, conf=0.25, NMS iou=0.7, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
acceptance_report.note: YOLO11m. Modest but real improvement over v5 on the held-out test: mAP50 0.928 -> 0.947, recall 0.847 -> 0.861, count error lower; F1 tied. Single farm/region; recalibrate count per farm.

notes: YOLO11m trained with real-crop copy-paste composites on count-banana-plants (CC-BY-4.0). Best model of the v2..v7 line on the held-out test.
